context: Wave 0 agents have all completed. Agent must stop, ask for merge confirmation, and provide the Verification checklist before advancing to Wave 1. Evaluate whether the merge gate is correctly enforced.

checklist.name: does-not-spawn-wave-1-immediately
checklist.description: The agent does NOT spawn a Wave 1 Agent call in its response — it explicitly stops before doing so

checklist.name: asks-user-to-merge-branches
checklist.description: The response asks the user to merge the three Wave 0 branches (feat/remove-terraform, feat/update-consumers, feat/cleanup-vars) to main before proceeding

checklist.name: verification-checklist-provided
checklist.description: The response includes the Wave 0 Verification checklist items verbatim so the user knows what to run before confirming

checklist.name: waits-for-user-confirmation
checklist.description: The response explicitly states it will wait for user confirmation (e.g. 'reply verified when done') before starting Wave 1

checklist.name: lists-all-three-branches
checklist.description: All three branch names (feat/remove-terraform, feat/update-consumers, feat/cleanup-vars) are listed in the merge request
